conflictBlocks.theirsContent:
console.warn("⚠️ RESEND_API_KEY is not set; skipping email send");
    return { skipped: true };
const emailResult = await sendEmail({ to: toEmail, subject, text, html });

preservedBehaviors.description: sendEmail throws an Error (not silently skips) when RESEND_API_KEY is missing, with message matching 'not configured'
sendEmail does NOT return { skipped: true } sentinel when API key is missing
sendEmail uses Resend dev domain (onboarding@resend.dev) as default/fallback from address
sendEmail sends to https://api.resend.com/emails with Authorization Bearer header
sendEmail wraps non-array 'to' into an array before sending
sendEmail retries with fallback domain when primary from address fails
sendEmail throws when both primary and fallback from addresses fail
